channel.title: Azure Updates on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Updates on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP
item.description:
Microsoft Entra ID-based access for Azure Blob Storage SFTP is now generally available in all regions. It allows Entra ID identities, including guest users via Entra External Identities, to connect to Azure Blob Storage over SFTP.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Github Copilot modernization
item.description:
GitHub Copilot modernization agent is now generally available. It provides coordinated orchestration from estate to code to help scale application assessments and upgrades across an app portfolio.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: New Azure Cosmos DB cost estimator
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB cost estimator is now in public preview. It helps model throughput, storage, regions, and capacity mode before provisioning an account.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure NetApp Files object REST API
item.description:
Azure NetApp Files Object REST API is now generally available. It provides an S3-compatible REST API for working with existing Azure NetApp Files data in cloud applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates
